programs.title: The Last Thing Mary Saw
programs.desc: In the spring of 1840, a family questions the circumstances of the death of their matriarch.

programs.title: Hatching
programs.desc: A 12-year-old gymnast befriends a creature that emerges from a strange egg.

programs.title: Rent-a-Pal
programs.desc: A strange VHS tape allows a lonely bachelor to find companionship with its host -- but at a cost.

programs.title: Sacrifice
programs.desc: A surgeon finds a woman with her heart ripped out and strange symbols carved into her flesh.

programs.title: The Other Lamb
programs.desc: A young woman born into an all-female cult beings to question the teachings of her leader.

programs.title: Hellbender
programs.desc: A teen and her mother drift apart when the teen discovers a family tie to witchcraft.
